name: Dragon Mastery
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>操</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each monster you control that is equipped with a "Dragunity" monster(s) gains 500 ATK. Once per turn, you can select 1 face-up monster you control, and equip it with 1 Dragon-Type "Dragunity" monster from your hand.
eff: Each monster you control that is equipped with a "Dragunity" monster(s) gains 500 ATK. Once per turn, you can select 1 face-up monster you control, and equip it with 1 Dragon-Type "Dragunity" monster from your hand.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand
